title: THE MERGE MURDER
description: Two parallel investigations must become one. But merging them reveals a deadly conflict.
story_intro:
The phone call came at midnight. 'Detective, we have a merge conflict. And this time... it's fatal.'

Two teams had been investigating the same case from different angles. Now their findings needed to come together. But the merge revealed inconsistencies - someone was lying.

I grabbed my fedora. Resolving conflicts is messy business, but someone's gotta do it.

steps.instruction: First, make sure you're on the main branch.
steps.narrative: Before any merge, I needed solid ground. The main branch was my anchor.
It was time to combine the evidence. Two stories would become one - or expose a liar.

steps.instruction: Check the status to see the conflict details.
steps.narrative: The merge failed. Conflicting testimonies. I needed to see exactly where the stories didn't match.

steps.instruction: After resolving conflicts manually, stage the resolved files.
steps.narrative: I pieced together the truth from both versions. Now to mark the conflict as resolved.

steps.instruction: Complete the merge with a commit.
steps.narrative: The truth was finally clear. One story, resolved. Case closed.
